overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a nighttime walk through neon-lit urban environments. The player moves from covered walkways along busy streets, past digital billboards and palm trees, into a commercial corridor with pink neon lighting, and finally ascends a stairway toward an upper level.

tall buildings with glowing advertisements and signage

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a covered urban walkway at night. Concrete pillars line the right side while a busy multi-lane street with moderate traffic flows to the left. Neon-lit skyscrapers are visible in the distance, and a vending machine is embedded in the right wall.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed walkway to an open area beneath a massive elevated overpass. Palm trees line the sidewalk while digital billboards glow on nearby buildings. The camera continues walking forward with moderate traffic visible on the left and the urban skyline ahead.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a dense commercial area with large curved digital billboards displaying advertisements on the right. The sidewalk is moderately crowded with pedestrians, and futuristic glass skyscrapers rise in the background. Palm trees continue to line the left side of the path.

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a narrow covered corridor bathed in pink and purple neon light. Graffiti covers the right wall while the camera moves toward a wide stairway at the far end. Other pedestrians are visible walking in the same direction toward the stairs.

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the ascent up a wide concrete stairway within the pink-lit corridor. Graffiti continues along the right wall while illuminated cherry blossom trees become visible at the top of the stairs. A security guard stands on the stairs as the camera climbs toward the upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk city, moving from a sheltered urban walkway into a sprawling, open commercial district. It begins along a covered concrete path lined with pillars and a vending machine, with a busy multi-lane street flowing alongside. As the camera moves forward, the enclosure gives way to an open area beneath a massive elevated overpass where palm trees and glowing digital billboards emerge against the skyline. The scene then shifts into a dense commercial corridor, where the path becomes crowded with pedestrians and dominated by large, curved advertisements on the right. Finally, the view expands to reveal towering futuristic glass skyscrapers rising above the palm-lined sidewalk.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban corridor that culminates in an ascent toward a luminous upper level. It begins by gliding through a narrow walkway bathed in pink and purple light, passing graffiti-covered walls and fellow pedestrians moving toward a distant exit. As the camera reaches the end of the corridor, the scene shifts into a climb up a wide concrete stairway where the vibrant neon glow persists. The ascent continues past a stationed security guard and further graffiti before finally opening up to reveal illuminated cherry blossom trees at the top of the stairs.
